name: Generate iCAL
tagline: Generate downloadable iCalendar (.ics) files or shareable URLs from event details
description: Create an iCalendar event file or a shareable iCalendar URL from event details (summary, description, organizer, attendees, time, and optional recurrence). Requires an ApyHub API token.

auth.hint: Create a token from your ApyHub account (My Apps page) and send it in the apy-token request header.

tools.name: generate_ical_event
tools.description: Generate an iCalendar event as a downloadable .ics file or as a shareable URL, with optional recurrence.

params.name: responseFormat
params.description: Desired output type: "file" to return an .ics file, or "url" to return a shareable link.

params.name: output
params.description: Output file name, e.g. invite.ics. Defaults to invite.ics.

params.name: organizer_email
params.description: Email address of the event organizer.

params.name: attendees_email
params.description: Email addresses of the event attendees.

params.name: time_zone
params.description: IANA time zone for the event, e.g. America/New_York.

params.name: recurrence
params.description: Recurrence settings when recurring is true, containing frequency (e.g. WEEKLY) and count (number of occurrences).
